differential_diagnoses: Primary angiitis of the central nervous system (PACNS)
next_steps: Send CSF for autoimmune encephalitis panel including LGI1, CASPR2, and GABA-B receptor antibodies
Send serum for paraneoplastic antibody panel
Perform whole-body PET/CT scan to screen for occult malignancy
Obtain MRI of the brain with specialized sequences for gadolinium enhancement or vessel wall imaging
Consider empiric treatment with high-dose intravenous corticosteroids after ruling out active infection
Complete formal cognitive testing and neuropsychological evaluation
